# ArunKumar Kandasamy — Engineering Lead & Technical Consultant

> Portfolio: https://arunkumar1ly.vercel.app/
> Consulting case studies: https://arunkumar1ly.vercel.app/consulting
> Contact: kandasamy1ly@gmail.com

## About

ArunKumar Kandasamy is a Chennai-based Engineering Lead with 16+ years of experience designing and delivering web platforms and enterprise products. He combines hands-on architecture and engineering (Ruby on Rails, React, Next.js, cloud, distributed systems) with end-to-end technical delivery ownership.

## Expertise

- Ruby on Rails, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- Solutions architecture, technical consulting, product thinking
- PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, Docker, CI/CD
- Performance optimization, Agile and hybrid delivery leadership

## Consulting Engagements

- The Legacy Apparels (https://thelegacyapparels.com) — Fashion/apparel brand website; frontend engineering and AWS S3 deployment via Terraform.
